opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't slept a wink in two nights, my brain won't shut off, and I feel like I'm losing my mind from exhaustion.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I can't sleep at all since a sudden job loss and I'm exhausted and desperate.

symptom_narrative.onset: 48 hours ago after sudden redundancy at work
symptom_narrative.character: can't fall or stay asleep, racing mind, daytime fatigue and poor concentration, irritability
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: total sleep loss for 2 nights, feels like losing my mind
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: distressed by the lack of sleep (not feeling refreshed/energised); NO thoughts of self-harm, NO elevated/grandiose mood or not-needing-sleep, no hallucinations, no excess caffeine/stimulants; unsafe to drive due to exhaustion

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; acute stressor (job loss); screens in bed

objective_data_offered.value: no sleep for ~2 nights after job loss; racing mind; exhausted
distressed and anxious but oriented; denies self-harm thoughts and denies feeling high/energised without sleep
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported; no formal mental-state exam remotely
